- Change matches::text to matches::textb::text for proper JSONB text search
- Update column names to match actual database schema
- This fixes the 500 error when searching for match_id in JSONB data
- FC Lorient vs Le Havre AC (match_id: 542703) will now be found correctly
- Endpoint will return proper AI prediction data instead of 500 error"', { stdio: 'inherit' });
